title: GST E-Way Bill Penalty Reply | Virtual Auditor | Virtual Auditor
description: Defence against e-way bill penalty. Goods detention, Section 129/130. Part B not updated, expired e-way bill. Expert representation.
bodyText:
HEADING1:GST E-Way Bill Penalty Reply | Virtual Auditor

What is GST E-Way Bill Penalty Reply | Virtual Auditor | Virtual Auditor?

Defence against e-way bill penalty. Goods detention, Section 129/130. Part B not updated, expired e-way bill. Expert representation.
Virtual Auditor provides professional gst e-way bill penalty reply | virtual auditor services across Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai. Our team of qualified Chartered Accountants (FCA), Company Secretaries (ACS), Certified Fraud Examiners (CFE), and IBBI Registered Valuers ensures compliance and accuracy.

HEADING2:Our Approach

HEADING2:Offices
Chennai (HQ): G-131, Ground Floor, Phase 3, Spencer Plaza Mall, Anna Salai, Chennai 600002. Phone: +91 99622 60333.
Bangalore: 7th Floor, Mahalakshmi Chambers, 29, MG Road, Bangalore 560001. Phone: +91 95139 39333.
Mumbai: Workafella, AK Estate, SV Road, Goregaon West, Mumbai 400062. Phone: +91 77000 89597.
Email: support@virtualauditor.in

Our practice handles e-way bill related penalties under GST, including detention of goods (Section 129), seizure proceedings, and penalty orders. Services include: analysis of the detention/seizure order, preparation of reply and representation before the proper officer, arranging security/bond for provisional release of goods, filing of appeal before Appellate Authority, and advisory on e-way bill compliance best practices. Common penalty situations include expired e-way bills, wrong vehicle number, incorrect consignment value, and movement without e-way bill. Penalties can range from Rs. 10,000 to 200% of tax evaded.
Why Choose Virtual Auditor?

Virtual Auditor brings a unique combination of professional credentials (FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI Registered Valuer) and technology-driven service delivery. Our digital-first approach enables efficient engagement management with real-time status tracking for clients. We maintain strict confidentiality through secure document handling protocols and encrypted communication channels. Our team provides responsive support with dedicated relationship managers for each engagement. With offices in Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai, and a pan-India service capability through our digital infrastructure, we serve clients ranging from startups to listed corporations. Contact us for a free initial consultation to discuss your specific requirements and receive a customized service proposal.
